title: Add configurable date range parameter type for reports

comments.text: Epic progress: delivered date_range support across dashboard parameter parsing/rendering/validation, report dispatch flattening, backend parameter ingestion/validation, and FeedbackAnalysis compatibility alias. Pending only final review/merge.
